raw_consumer_statement:
Initial Citibank credit card transaction on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$4000.00} paid to XXXX company XXXX for a vacation deposit. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from XXXX stating their company has cancelled my vacation. 

I contacted Citibank by phone on XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX informing Citibank representative, supervisor and customer service manager that I would require a refund of the vacation deposit in the amount of {$4000.00} since goods and service ( in this case a vacation ) was not received by the merchant. The merchant cancelled my vacation without my request/permission. 

I have also written and mailed a letter to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. Citibank states they are not able to help and suggested I contact a lawyer.
